description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open, spacious layout. The structure features a mix of white and neutral-toned exterior walls, large windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a patio and a pool area with a pergola. The front entrance is set back behind a fenced courtyard, while the rear opens to a private backyard with a wooden deck and blue pool. The interior is organized around a central living area, with visible kitchen, dining, and lounge spaces, as well as several bedrooms and bathrooms. The design emphasizes clean lines, open sightlines, and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces. The use of glass, wood, and concrete materials is evident throughout the property.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and open indoor-outdoor living spaces, including a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fenced courtyard, main entrance, and a glimpse of the central living area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, large windows, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard, wooden deck, pergola, and blue pool, with access to the main living areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, additional green space, and the overall linear arrangement of rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
